General.Name: Min Fu International Holding Ltd
General.Description: Min Fu International Holding Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the smart manufacturing solutions and burial business in the People's Republic of China. It operates in Equipment Manufacturing Business and Burial Business segments. The company sells equipment; offers digital smart worship ancestors and relevant technical services; and provides agency services for sale of burial plots and columbarium units, as well as offers other burial related services. It also provides high-end precision 3D testing and precision machining solutions to various customers in aviation, aerospace, shipbuilding, ground transportation vehicles, and electronic industries. The company was formerly known as Zhicheng Technology Group Ltd. and changed its name to Min Fu International Holding Limited in April 2022. Min Fu International Holding Limited was founded in 2008 and is based in Causeway Bay, Hong Kong.
General.Address: 33 Hysan Avenue, Causeway Bay, Hong Kong
